Operation 'getOverriddenEffectiveConfig' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'overridden' means in context. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes an 'overridden' value and doesn't explain the practical use case. Added context about configuration sources, the purpose of viewing overridden settings, and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves only the overridden configuration values for an agent and application combination, showing the effective value alongside other source values.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves only the configuration values that have been overridden for a specific agent and application combination. Returns the effective value for each overridden setting along with the source values from various configuration sources (e.g., policy, environment, defaults). Useful for identifying which configuration settings deviate from defaults. Requires organization ID, agent reporting instance ID, and application ID.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'overridden' means in context. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes an 'overridden' value and doesn't explain the practical use case. Added context about configuration sources, the purpose of viewing overridden settings, and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getHostnames' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_input_details. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the source (server inventory). Description mentions filtering but doesn't clarify pagination parameters or the practical use case. Enhanced summary to specify 'server inventory' context. Expanded description to explain pagination support, filtering capabilities, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of hostnames from the server inventory for an organization with optional text filtering.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of hostnames from the server inventory for an organization. Supports optional text-based filtering to search for specific hostnames. Returns paginated results with hostname details. Useful for discovering servers deployed in your organization or filtering to specific hosts. Supports standard pagination parameters (page, size, sort).
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the source (server inventory). Description mentions filtering but doesn't clarify pagination parameters or the practical use case. Enhanced summary to specify 'server inventory' context. Expanded description to explain pagination support, filtering capabilities, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

Enhanced version specifies supported filters, return content, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents for an organization with optional filtering.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of organization agents
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents deployed in an organization. Supports optional filtering by status, language, environment, and other criteria. Returns agent details including version, status, and deployment information. Use pagination parameters to control result set size and offset.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what filtering options are available, what agent details are returned, and how pagination works. Enhanced version specifies supported filters, return content, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves agent summary information grouped by application with optional filtering and pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves agent summary information organized by application. Supports pagination for managing large result sets. Useful for understanding agent deployment across applications.

data.current_description: Retrieves a specific agent by its reporting instance ID and application ID.

message: Operation 'getAgentEffectiveConfig' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and specific. Description lacks important context about what 'effective configuration' means (merged from multiple sources), what configuration details are returned, and the use case. Enhanced version explains the configuration hierarchy and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus other agent retrieval operations.

data.current_summary: Get effective configuration of an agent for a specific application
data.current_description: Retrieves the complete effective configuration of an agent for a specific application and organization.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete effective configuration for an agent deployed to a specific application. The effective configuration represents the final merged configuration from all sources (defaults, organization-level settings, application-level settings, and agent-level overrides). Returns configuration settings with their sources and values. Use this to understand what configuration is actually active for an agent.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and specific. Description lacks important context about what 'effective configuration' means (merged from multiple sources), what configuration details are returned, and the use case. Enhanced version explains the configuration hierarchy and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus other agent retrieval operations.

Operation 'getOverriddenEffectiveConfig' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'overridden' means in context. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes an 'overridden' value and doesn't explain the practical use case. Added context about configuration sources, the purpose of viewing overridden settings, and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves only the overridden configuration values for an agent and application combination, showing the effective value alongside other source values.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves only the configuration values that have been overridden for a specific agent and application combination. Returns the effective value for each overridden setting along with the source values from various configuration sources (e.g., policy, environment, defaults). Useful for identifying which configuration settings deviate from defaults. Requires organization ID, agent reporting instance ID, and application ID.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'overridden' means in context. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes an 'overridden' value and doesn't explain the practical use case. Added context about configuration sources, the purpose of viewing overridden settings, and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getHostnames' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_input_details. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the source (server inventory). Description mentions filtering but doesn't clarify pagination parameters or the practical use case. Enhanced summary to specify 'server inventory' context. Expanded description to explain pagination support, filtering capabilities, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of hostnames from the server inventory for an organization with optional text filtering.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of hostnames from the server inventory for an organization. Supports optional text-based filtering to search for specific hostnames. Returns paginated results with hostname details. Useful for discovering servers deployed in your organization or filtering to specific hosts. Supports standard pagination parameters (page, size, sort).
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the source (server inventory). Description mentions filtering but doesn't clarify pagination parameters or the practical use case. Enhanced summary to specify 'server inventory' context. Expanded description to explain pagination support, filtering capabilities, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

message: Operation 'getAllAgents' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Enhanced version specifies supported filters, return content, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents for an organization with optional filtering.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of organization agents
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all agents deployed in an organization. Supports optional filtering by status, language, environment, and other criteria. Returns agent details including version, status, and deployment information. Use pagination parameters to control result set size and offset.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what filtering options are available, what agent details are returned, and how pagination works. Enhanced version specifies supported filters, return content, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getApplicationAgents' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain the hierarchical grouping structure, clarify what 'summary information' includes, specify available filters, and explain pagination behavior. This helps AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this endpoint versus getAllAgents.

data.current_description: Retrieves agent summary information grouped by application with optional filtering and pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves agent summary information organized by application. Returns agents grouped hierarchically by their associated applications with optional filtering by status, language, environment, and other criteria. Supports pagination for managing large result sets. Each group contains application-level agent summaries.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain the hierarchical grouping structure, clarify what 'summary information' includes, specify available filters, and explain pagination behavior. This helps AI agents understand the response structure and when to use this endpoint versus getAllAgents.

data.current_summary: Get a specific agent by instance ID and application ID

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific agent identified by its reporting instance ID and associated application ID. message: Operation 'getAgentEffectiveConfig' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and specific. Description lacks important context about what 'effective configuration' means (merged from multiple sources), what information is returned (settings, values, sources), and the use case (understanding actual runtime configuration). Enhanced version explains the configuration hierarchy and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus other configuration endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get effective configuration of an agent for a specific application
data.current_description: Retrieves the complete effective configuration of an agent for a specific application and organization.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete effective configuration for an agent deployed to a specific application. The effective configuration represents the final merged configuration from all sources (defaults, organization-level, application-level, and agent-level overrides). Returns configuration settings with their values and source information. Use this to understand the actual runtime configuration applied to an agent.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and specific. Description lacks important context about what 'effective configuration' means (merged from multiple sources), what information is returned (settings, values, sources), and the use case (understanding actual runtime configuration). Enhanced version explains the configuration hierarchy and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus other configuration endpoints.
